.exit
const { ethers } = require('hardhat'); await ethers.getContractFactory('AtomicEscrow').then(f=>f.deploy()).then(c=>c.waitForDeployment().then(()=>console.log('deployed at',c.target))).catch(console.error);
await ethers.getContractFactory('AtomicEscrow').then(f=>f.deploy()).then(c=>c.waitForDeployment().then(()=>console.log('deployed at',c.target))).catch(console.error);
